three_adjectives.strong: Three distinct adjectives. Each has a specific accomplishment. No buzzword soup.
three_adjectives.adequate: Two solid, one vague. Still shows some self-awareness.
three_adjectives.weak: Generic traits only. Cannot link to outcomes.
three_adjectives.fail: Refuses, jokes it off, or hostile.

last_book.strong: Recent book or honest learning substitute with takeaway applied to work or life.
last_book.adequate: Remembers something; takeaway thin but real.
last_book.weak: Vague, long ago only, clearly stretching.

define_success.strong: Success includes doing the job well, trust, reliability, or customer outcome.
define_success.adequate: Mix of personal and work goals with some substance.
define_success.weak: Only external rewards. No tie to work quality.
define_success.fail: Success = minimum effort or gaming the system.

decision_matrix.hire: No fail scores on finishers. At least two strong or adequate on finishers. Core questions pass. Technical gate pass if applicable.
decision_matrix.pass: Any finisher fail. Two or more weak finishers. Red flags on reliability or accountability. Failed technical gate.
decision_matrix.maybe: One weak finisher but strong elsewhere. Use sparingly. 48h rule from playbook.

positive: Success definition includes craft or customer
Learning answer is honest and recent
negative: Success = as little work as possible
